lessons: CRITICAL fixed: 'Leumi Card' was rebranded to Max in 2019; updated the credit-card table to Max (formerly Leumi Card) and corrected invented card products (Cal->Cash Cal Pro, Max->Max Back Total, Isracard Americard/Isra Club -> Isracard Cashback / American Express Hever club).

CRITICAL fixed: gift-card 5-year-validity legal citation was wrong (cited Tikun 47 2017 / Sec 14יג1). The 5-year minimum is correct but comes from Amendment 33 (2014), section 14ח; corrected in SKILL.md, SKILL_HE.md, and the reference file.
CRITICAL fixed: two broken gov.il reference links (consumer_protection_authority -> consumer_protection_and_fair_trade_authority; credit-card-complaint -> filing_a_complaint_to_fair_trade_authority).
CRITICAL fixed: dead link couponmania.co.il (no DNS) removed from the coupon-aggregators table.

MAJOR fixed: dropped '012 Mobile' MVNO row (absorbed into Partner; HE already omitted it); redescribed Yours.co.il as a members' discount club (not fashion); relabeled PayBack as a cashback service (not points); scoped the 14-day cooling-off claim to door-to-door (sec 14) + distance (sec 14ג) sales and continuous contracts cancellable any time (sec 13א1) instead of 'most service contracts'.
MINOR fixed: softened 'cancellation must be as easy as sign-up' (a US FTC framing) to 'reasonably accessible'.

Deferred (next cycle): telecom MVNO unlimited prices lean low for 2026 (~50-60 NIS now vs the 30-50 stated); the El-Al FLY CARD moving from Cal to Isracard (2027) muddles the traveler-card guidance, refresh the card section then. EN/HE ## parity is 12 vs 11 (pre-existing structural divergence).

Panel round 2 fixes: Judge caught Golan Telecom mislabeled as 'MVNO' (it is a facilities-based independent operator; Rami Levy is the MVNO) -> changed to 'Independent operator' (EN+HE). Expert CRITICAL: the continuous-contract cancellation section was cited as 13א1, but two domain agents disagreed (13א=disclosure vs 13ד/14ט=cancellation), so dropped the contested subsection and reference the general continuous-transaction (esek mitmashech) provisions. Expert MAJORs: softened 'interest-free installments up to 12 months / always choose tashlumim' to '3-6 payments typical, verify per term'; replaced the Madlan insurance reference (Madlan is real-estate, not insurance) with Har HaBituach; added a hedged note about the 2025 gift-card extension reform.
